raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Joabs redſeja / 
ka tas Karſch prett winnu tai-
ſhts bija no preeſſchpuſſes un no
pakkaſenes/ tad iſlaſſiia wiſch
zittus no Ifraēta jauneem Wiḥ-
reim / un iſtaisijahs prett teem
Sihrereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tohs zittus Landis
dewe wiſch Abisajam fauam
Brahtam Rohka/ un tee taifi-
jahs prett teem Ammona Behr-
neem /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch fazziia : Ja tee
Sihreri ſtipraki buhs ne ka es/
tad nahz tu man par Paligu /
bet ja Ammona Behrni ſtipraki
buhs ne ka tu/ tad nahkſchu es
tew par Paltgu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nemnees, drohſchuPrah-
tu / un laid mehs ſtipri turra-
mees preeſſch muhſeem Landin/
un preeſſch muhfa Deewa Pills-
fahteem/ un tas KUNGS dar-
rihs/ kas tam patihſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joabs nahze tuwaki
ar faweem Laudin/ kas pee win-
xa bija/ ar teem Sihrexeem kan-
tees / bet tee behdſe preeſſch
winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Ammona Behr-
ni redſeja/ ka tee Sihreri behdſe/
tad behdſe tee arridsan preeſſch
Abisaju winna Brahti/ un tee
nahze Pillsfahta/ un Joabs nah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tee Sihreri re-
dſeja/ ka tee Ifraēta Preeſſcha
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tas Dahwidau
pe fluddinahts / tad ſap
wiſch wiſſu Ifraelu / un
vaht to Jardanu/ un kad to
teem nahze/ tad taifijahs n
prett teem / un kad Dah
prett teem Sihrexeem us
ſchanu bij taifijees/ tad ka
tee ar winzu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Sihreri
Ifraēta Preeſſcha/ un Dah
kawe no teem Sihrexeem
thukſtoſchus Rattus/ un t
defſmits thukſtoſchus Kal
kus/ wiſch kawe arridsan
wakn to Kara Leel-Kungu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Adad-Eese-
pi redſeja/ ka tee Ifraēta
ſcha ſauti tapputſchi/ tad d
tee Meeru ar Dahwidu/
poja winnam. Un tee Si-
gribbeja wairs Ammona
neem palihdſeht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
